Spring Data Redis
  1. org.springframework.data.redis.core

Uses of Package
org.springframework.data.redis.core

Packages that use org.springframework.data.redis.core
Package
Description
org.springframework.data.redis.connection
Connection package providing low-level abstractions for interacting with the various Redis 'drivers'/libraries.
org.springframework.data.redis.connection.jedis
Connection package for Jedis library.
org.springframework.data.redis.connection.lettuce
Connection package for Lettuce Redis client.
org.springframework.data.redis.core
Core package for integrating Redis with Spring concepts.
org.springframework.data.redis.core.convert
Converters for Redis repository support utilizing mapping metadata.
org.springframework.data.redis.core.mapping
Redis specific repository support mapping meta information.
org.springframework.data.redis.core.script
Lua script execution abstraction.
org.springframework.data.redis.listener
Base package for Redis message listener / pubsub container facility
org.springframework.data.redis.messaging
Redis Pub/Sub support for Spring Messaging.
org.springframework.data.redis.repository.cdi
CDI support for Redis specific repository implementation.
org.springframework.data.redis.repository.support
Spring context specific factory support.
org.springframework.data.redis.support.atomic
Small toolkit mirroring the java.util.atomic package in Redis.
org.springframework.data.redis.support.collections
Package providing implementations for most of the java.util collections on top of Redis.
  • Classes in org.springframework.data.redis.core used by org.springframework.data.redis.connection
    Class
    Description
    Cursor
    Cursor abstraction to scan over the keyspace or elements within a data structure using a variant of a SCAN command.
    KeyScanOptions
    Options to be used for with SCAN commands.
    ScanOptions
    Options to be used for with SCAN commands.
  • Classes in org.springframework.data.redis.core used by org.springframework.data.redis.connection.jedis
    Class
    Description
    Cursor
    Cursor abstraction to scan over the keyspace or elements within a data structure using a variant of a SCAN command.
    ScanOptions
    Options to be used for with SCAN commands.
  • Classes in org.springframework.data.redis.core used by org.springframework.data.redis.connection.lettuce
    Class
    Description
    Cursor
    Cursor abstraction to scan over the keyspace or elements within a data structure using a variant of a SCAN command.
    ScanOptions
    Options to be used for with SCAN commands.
  • Classes in org.springframework.data.redis.core used by org.springframework.data.redis.core
    Class
    Description
    BoundGeoOperations
    GeoOperations bound to a certain key.
    BoundHashFieldExpirationOperations
    Hash Field Expiration operations bound to a certain hash key and set of hash fields.
    BoundHashOperations
    Hash operations bound to a certain key.
    BoundKeyExpirationOperations
    Key Expiration operations bound to a key.
    BoundKeyOperations
    Operations over a Redis key.
    BoundListOperations
    List operations bound to a certain key.
    BoundSetOperations
    Set operations bound to a certain key.
    BoundStreamOperations
    Redis stream specific operations bound to a certain key.
    BoundValueOperations
    Value (or String in Redis terminology) operations bound to a certain key.
    BoundZSetOperations
    ZSet (or SortedSet) operations bound to a certain key.
    BulkMapper
    Mapper translating Redis bulk value responses (typically returned by a sort query) to actual objects.
    ClusterOperations
    Redis operations for cluster specific operations.
    Cursor
    Cursor abstraction to scan over the keyspace or elements within a data structure using a variant of a SCAN command.
    Cursor.CursorId
    Value class representing a cursor identifier.
    DeleteSpec
    Steps for configuring a DELETE operation.
    DeleteSpec.ComparisonSpec
    Steps to customize value or digest comparison for conditional delete operations.
    ExpireChanges
    Value Object linking a number of keys to their ExpireChanges.ExpiryChangeState retaining the order of the original source.
    ExpireChanges.ExpiryChangeState
     
    GeoOperations
    Redis operations for geo commands.
    HashMapperProvider
    Function that returns a HashMapper for a given type.
    HashOperations
    Redis map specific operations working on a hash.
    HyperLogLogOperations
     
    KeyScanOptions
    Options to be used for with SCAN commands.
    ListOperations
    Redis list specific operations.
    ListOperations.MoveFrom
    Value object representing the where from part for the LMOVE command.
    ListOperations.MoveTo
    Value object representing the where to from part for the LMOVE command.
    PartialUpdate
    PartialUpdate allows to issue individual property updates without the need of rewriting the whole entity.
    PartialUpdate.PropertyUpdate
     
    PartialUpdate.UpdateCommand
     
    ReactiveGeoOperations
    Reactive Redis operations for Geo Commands.
    ReactiveHashOperations
    Reactive Redis operations for Hash Commands.
    ReactiveHyperLogLogOperations
    Reactive Redis operations for working on a HyperLogLog multiset.
    ReactiveListOperations
    Reactive Redis operations for List Commands.
    ReactiveRedisCallback
    Generic callback interface for code that operates on a low-level ReactiveRedisConnection.
    ReactiveRedisOperations
    Interface that specified a basic set of Redis operations, implemented by ReactiveRedisTemplate.
    ReactiveRedisSessionCallback
    Generic callback interface for code that wants to use the same ReactiveRedisConnection avoiding connection allocation overhead upon each Template API method call.
    ReactiveRedisTemplate
    Central abstraction for reactive Redis data access implementing ReactiveRedisOperations.
    ReactiveSetOperations
    Reactive Redis operations for Set Commands.
    ReactiveStreamOperations
    Reactive Redis operations for Stream Commands.
    ReactiveValueOperations
    Reactive Redis operations for simple (or in Redis terminology 'string') values.
    ReactiveZSetOperations
    Reactive Redis operations for Sorted (ZSet) Commands.
    RedisAccessor
    Base class for RedisTemplate implementations defining common properties.
    RedisCallback
    Callback interface for Redis 'low level' code.
    RedisCommand
    Enumeration of well-known Redis commands.
    RedisKeyspaceEvent
    Redis specific ApplicationEvent published when a key expires in Redis.
    RedisKeyValueAdapter
    Redis specific KeyValueAdapter implementation.
    RedisKeyValueAdapter.EnableKeyspaceEvents
     
    RedisKeyValueAdapter.ShadowCopy
    Configuration flag controlling storage of phantom keys (shadow copies) of expiring entities to read them later when publishing RedisKeyspaceEvent.
    RedisOperations
    Interface that specified a basic set of Redis operations, implemented by RedisTemplate.
    RedisTemplate
    Helper class that simplifies Redis data access code.
    ScanCursor
    Redis client agnostic Cursor implementation continuously loading additional results from Redis server until reaching its starting point zero.
    ScanIteration
    ScanIteration holds the values contained in Redis Multibulk reply on exectuting SCAN command.
    ScanOptions
    Options to be used for with SCAN commands.
    ScanOptions.ScanOptionsBuilder
     
    SessionCallback
    Callback executing all operations against a surrogate 'session' (basically against the same underlying Redis connection).
    SetOperations
    Redis set specific operations.
    SetSpec
    Steps for configuring a SET operation.
    SetSpec.ComparisonSpec
    Steps to customize value or digest comparison for conditional set operations.
    StreamOperations
    Redis stream specific operations.
    ValueOperations
    Redis operations for simple (or in Redis terminology 'string') values.
    ZSetOperations
    Redis ZSet/sorted set specific operations.
    ZSetOperations.TypedTuple
    Typed ZSet tuple.

    Description
    PartialUpdate
    PartialUpdate allows to issue individual property updates without the need of rewriting the whole entity.
    RedisOperations
    Interface that specified a basic set of Redis operations, implemented by RedisTemplate.

    Class
    Description
    TimeToLiveAccessor
    TimeToLiveAccessor extracts the objects time to live used for EXPIRE.

    Description
    RedisTemplate
    Helper class that simplifies Redis data access code.
  • Classes in org.springframework.data.redis.core used by org.springframework.data.redis.listener
    Class
    Description
    RedisKeyExpiredEvent
    RedisKeyExpiredEvent is a Redis specific ApplicationEvent published when a particular key in Redis expires.

    Class
    Description
    RedisOperations
    Interface that specified a basic set of Redis operations, implemented by RedisTemplate.

    Redis specific KeyValueAdapter implementation.
